name: Memorable Mincemeat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
3. Allow the mixture to cool before refrigerating or freezing in recipe size portions.
Note: Dark raisins may be used instead of currants, and ground cloves can substitute for mace. Mincemeat is recommended for long-term storage (1-2 years). Spoon into pint sealers and process for 30 minutes in a boiling water bath.
